title: Gaia's Riddle
description: Solarpunkish modpack foregrounding dynamic environments, exploration and multiplayer boss fights.
body:
![Gaia's Riddle, The Solar Powered SMP Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33f4717bc2c7f528d1a263a74a87642dbd3892c1.png)

# <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pdtEbxCSuus" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Gaia’s Riddle is a modpack that aims to change how you think and play in Minecraft. With dynamic environment and technology mods, Gaia’s Riddle is a moderately sized modpack where you now have to consider whether to try and control and dominate nature, or work with its already changed conditions and rhythms brought on by anthropocenic climate change. You will explore, build, and fight in a challenging world that feels alive and not always at your beck and call.



## Featured Mods

With a focus on rewarding exploration, modern environmental realities and milestone progression, Gaia’s Riddle offers plenty of opportunities for a solo or multiplayer adventure in an ever-changing world through a carefully curated selection of mods:

### Environment:
- Pollution of the Realms
- Serene Seasons
- Legendary Survival Overhaul
- Weather, Storms and Tornadoes

### Technology & Magic:
- Mekanism
- Pneumaticcraft
- Embers Rekindled
- Nature's Aura

### Exploration & Bossfight:
- Alex's Caves
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- StarGate Journey

### Terrain Generation:
- Oh the Biomes we've gone
- Biome Makeover
- [Lets do] Blooming Nature

And more!

 

 

There are plenty of useful mods for making the solarpunk base of your dreams. Will you try to preserve the world that you have built? Or will you adapt to the changes as it all crumbles to the ground?

Go ahead and try this latest modpack from the Technoculture, Art and Games Minecraft Bloc research group and see if you can solve Gaia's Riddle and change the way you play.  This is the first modpack designed for Sunblock One -- a fully autonomous Solar Minecraft server.





## Contact Us

Check out our website for the Gaia’s Riddle SMP!

https://minecraftbloc.milieux.ca/gaias-riddle/ 

 

Want to experience the SMP by yourself? Download the World File (Coming Soon) and Config folders here!

https://github.com/MC-Bloc/Gaias-Riddle



## Notes

This modpack is designed to run on Forge 1.20.1.

Dedicated ram for optimal performance: 8 GB.

This modpack uses MemoryLeakFix for enhanced performance.

Curseforge Mod Links:
- [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- [Quark (Programmer Art)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
